text: petros apostolos iēsou christou eklektois parepidēmois diasporas pontou galatias kappadokias asias kai bithynias
kata prognōsin theou patros en agiasmō pneumatos eis ypakoēn kai rantismon aimatos iēsou christou charis ymin kai eirēnē plēthyntheiē
eulogētos o theos kai patēr tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou o kata to poly autou eleos anagennēsas ymas eis elpida zōsan di anastaseōs iēsou christou ek nekrōn
eis klēronomian aphtharton kai amianton kai amaranton tetērēmenēn en ouranois eis ēmas
tous en dynamei theou phrouroumenous dia pisteōs eis sōtērian etoimēn apokalyphthēnai en kairō eschatō
en ō agalliasthe oligon arti ei deon estin lypēthentes en poikilois peirasmois
ina to dokimion ymōn tēs pisteōs poly timiōteron chrysiou tou apollymenou dia pyros de dokimazomenou eurethē eis epainon kai timēn kai doxan en apokalypsei iēsou christou
on ouk eidotes agapate eis on arti mē orōntes pisteuontes de agalliasthe chara aneklalētō kai dedoxasmenē
komizomenoi to telos tēs pisteōs ymōn sōtērian psychōn
peri ēs sōtērias exezētēsan kai exēreunēsan prophētai oi peri tēs eis ymas charitos prophēteusantes
ereunōntes eis tina ē poion kairon edēlou to en autois pneuma christou promartyromenon ta eis christon pathēmata kai tas meta tauta doxas
ois apekalyphthē oti ouch eautois ēmin de diēkonoun auta a nyn anēngelē ymin dia tōn euangelisamenōn ymas en pneumati agiō apostalenti ap ouranou eis a epithymousin angeloi parakypsai
dio anazōsamenoi tas osphyas tēs dianoias ymōn nēphontes teleiōs elpisate epi tēn pheromenēn ymin charin en apokalypsei iēsou christou
ōs tekna ypakoēs mē syschēmatizomenoi tais proteron en tē agnoia ymōn epithymiais
alla kata ton kalesanta ymas agion kai autoi agioi en pasē anastrophē genēthēte
dioti gegraptai agioi genesthe oti egō agios eimi
kai ei patera epikaleisthe ton aprosōpolēptōs krinonta kata to ekastou ergon en phobō ton tēs paroikias ymōn chronon anastraphēte
eidotes oti ou phthartois argyriō ē chrysiō elytrōthēte ek tēs mataias ymōn anastrophēs patroparadotou
alla timiō aimati ōs amnou amōmou kai aspilou christou
proegnōsmenou men pro katabolēs kosmou phanerōthentos de ep eschatōn tōn chronōn di ymas
tous di autou pisteuontas eis theon ton egeiranta auton ek nekrōn kai doxan autō donta ōste tēn pistin ymōn kai elpida einai eis theon
tas psychas ymōn ēgnikotes en tē ypakoē tēs alētheias dia pneumatos eis philadelphian anypokriton ek katharas kardias allēlous agapēsate ektenōs
anagegennēmenoi ouk ek sporas phthartēs alla aphthartou dia logou zōntos theou kai menontos eis ton aiōna
dioti pasa sarx ōs chortos kai pasa doxa anthrōpou ōs anthos chortou exēranthē o chortos kai to anthos autou exepesen
to de rēma kyriou menei eis ton aiōna touto de estin to rēma to euangelisthen eis ymas
apothemenoi oun pasan kakian kai panta dolon kai ypokriseis kai phthonous kai pasas katalalias
ōs artigennēta brephē to logikon adolon gala epipothēsate ina en autō auxēthēte
eiper egeusasthe oti chrēstos o kyrios
pros on proserchomenoi lithon zōnta ypo anthrōpōn men apodedokimasmenon para de theō eklekton entimon
kai autoi ōs lithoi zōntes oikodomeisthe oikos pneumatikos ierateuma agion anenenkai pneumatikas thysias euprosdektous tō theō dia iēsou christou
dio kai periechei en tē graphē idou tithēmi en siōn lithon akrogōniaion eklekton entimon kai o pisteuōn ep autō ou mē kataischynthē
ymin oun ē timē tois pisteuousin apeithousin de lithon on apedokimasan oi oikodomountes outos egenēthē eis kephalēn gōnias
kai lithos proskommatos kai petra skandalou oi proskoptousin tō logō apeithountes eis o kai etethēsan
ymeis de genos eklekton basileion ierateuma ethnos agion laos eis peripoiēsin opōs tas aretas exangeilēte tou ek skotous ymas kalesantos eis to thaumaston autou phōs
oi pote ou laos nyn de laos theou oi ouk ēleēmenoi nyn de eleēthentes
agapētoi parakalō ōs paroikous kai parepidēmous apechesthai tōn sarkikōn epithymiōn aitines strateuontai kata tēs psychēs
tēn anastrophēn ymōn en tois ethnesin echontes kalēn ina en ō katalalousin ymōn ōs kakopoiōn ek tōn kalōn ergōn epopteusantes doxasōsin ton theon en ēmera episkopēs
ypotagēte oun pasē anthrōpinē ktisei dia ton kyrion eite basilei ōs yperechonti
eite ēgemosin ōs di autou pempomenois eis ekdikēsin men kakopoiōn epainon de agathopoiōn
oti outōs estin to thelēma tou theou agathopoiountas phimoun tēn tōn aphronōn anthrōpōn agnōsian
ōs eleutheroi kai mē ōs epikalymma echontes tēs kakias tēn eleutherian all ōs douloi theou
pantas timēsate tēn adelphotēta agapate ton theon phobeisthe ton basilea timate
oi oiketai ypotassomenoi en panti phobō tois despotais ou monon tois agathois kai epieikesin alla kai tois skoliois
touto gar charis ei dia syneidēsin theou ypopherei tis lypas paschōn adikōs
poion gar kleos ei amartanontes kai kolaphizomenoi ypomeneite all ei agathopoiountes kai paschontes ypomeneite touto charis para theō
eis touto gar eklēthēte oti kai christos epathen yper ymōn ymin ypolimpanōn ypogrammon ina epakolouthēsēte tois ichnesin autou
os amartian ouk epoiēsen oude eurethē dolos en tō stomati autou
os loidoroumenos ouk anteloidorei paschōn ouk ēpeilei paredidou de tō krinonti dikaiōs
os tas amartias ēmōn autos anēnenken en tō sōmati autou epi to xylon ina tais amartiais apogenomenoi tē dikaiosynē zēsōmen ou tō mōlōpi autou iathēte
ēte gar ōs probata planōmena all epestraphēte nyn epi ton poimena kai episkopon tōn psychōn ymōn
omoiōs ai gynaikes ypotassomenai tois idiois andrasin ina kai ei tines apeithousin tō logō dia tēs tōn gynaikōn anastrophēs aneu logou kerdēthēsōntai
epopteusantes tēn en phobō agnēn anastrophēn ymōn
ōn estō ouch o exōthen emplokēs trichōn kai peritheseōs chrysiōn ē endyseōs imatiōn kosmos
all o kryptos tēs kardias anthrōpos en tō aphthartō tou praeos kai ēsychiou pneumatos o estin enōpion tou theou polyteles
outōs gar pote kai ai agiai gynaikes ai elpizousai epi ton theon ekosmoun eautas ypotassomenai tois idiois andrasin
ōs sarra ypēkousen tō abraam kyrion auton kalousa ēs egenēthēte tekna agathopoiousai kai mē phoboumenai mēdemian ptoēsin
oi andres omoiōs synoikountes kata gnōsin ōs asthenesterō skeuei tō gynaikeiō aponemontes timēn ōs kai synklēronomoi charitos zōēs eis to mē ekkoptesthai tas proseuchas ymōn
to de telos pantes omophrones sympatheis philadelphoi eusplanchnoi philophrones
mē apodidontes kakon anti kakou ē loidorian anti loidorias tounantion de eulogountes eidotes oti eis touto eklēthēte ina eulogian klēronomēsēte
o gar thelōn zōēn agapan kai idein ēmeras agathas pausatō tēn glōssan autou apo kakou kai cheilē autou tou mē lalēsai dolon
ekklinatō apo kakou kai poiēsatō agathon zētēsatō eirēnēn kai diōxatō autēn
oti oi ophthalmoi kyriou epi dikaious kai ōta autou eis deēsin autōn prosōpon de kyriou epi poiountas kaka
kai tis o kakōsōn ymas ean tou agathou mimētai genēsthe
all ei kai paschoite dia dikaiosynēn makarioi ton de phobon autōn mē phobēthēte mēde tarachthēte
kyrion de ton theon agiasate en tais kardiais ymōn etoimoi de aei pros apologian panti tō aitounti ymas logon peri tēs en ymin elpidos meta prautētos kai phobou
syneidēsin echontes agathēn ina en ō katalalōsin ymōn ōs kakopoiōn kataischynthōsin oi epēreazontes ymōn tēn agathēn en christō anastrophēn
kreitton gar agathopoiountas ei thelei to thelēma tou theou paschein ē kakopoiountas
oti kai christos apax peri amartiōn epathen dikaios yper adikōn ina ēmas prosagagē tō theō thanatōtheis men sarki zōopoiētheis de tō pneumati
en ō kai tois en phylakē pneumasin poreutheis ekēryxen
apeithēsasin pote ote apax exedecheto ē tou theou makrothymia en ēmerais nōe kataskeuazomenēs kibōtou eis ēn oligai tout estin oktō psychai diesōthēsan di ydatos
o kai ēmas antitypon nyn sōzei baptisma ou sarkos apothesis rypou alla syneidēseōs agathēs eperōtēma eis theon di anastaseōs iēsou christou
os estin en dexia tou theou poreutheis eis ouranon ypotagentōn autō angelōn kai exousiōn kai dynameōn
christou oun pathontos yper ēmōn sarki kai ymeis tēn autēn ennoian oplisasthe oti o pathōn en sarki pepautai amartias
eis to mēketi anthrōpōn epithymiais alla thelēmati theou ton epiloipon en sarki biōsai chronon
arketos gar ēmin o parelēlythōs chronos tou biou to thelēma tōn ethnōn katergasasthai peporeumenous en aselgeiais epithymiais oinophlygiais kōmois potois kai athemitois eidōlolatreiais
en ō xenizontai mē syntrechontōn ymōn eis tēn autēn tēs asōtias anachysin blasphēmountes
oi apodōsousin logon tō etoimōs echonti krinai zōntas kai nekrous
eis touto gar kai nekrois euēngelisthē ina krithōsin men kata anthrōpous sarki zōsin de kata theon pneumati
pantōn de to telos ēngiken sōphronēsate oun kai nēpsate eis tas proseuchas
pro pantōn de tēn eis eautous agapēn ektenē echontes oti ē agapē kalypsei plēthos amartiōn
philoxenoi eis allēlous aneu gongysmōn
ekastos kathōs elaben charisma eis eautous auto diakonountes ōs kaloi oikonomoi poikilēs charitos theou
ei tis lalei ōs logia theou ei tis diakonei ōs ex ischyos ēs chorēgei o theos ina en pasin doxazētai o theos dia iēsou christou ō estin ē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
agapētoi mē xenizesthe tē en ymin pyrōsei pros peirasmon ymin ginomenē ōs xenou ymin symbainontos
alla kathōs koinōneite tois tou christou pathēmasin chairete ina kai en tē apokalypsei tēs doxēs autou charēte agalliōmenoi
ei oneidizesthe en onomati christou makarioi oti to tēs doxēs kai to tou theou pneuma eph ymas anapauetai kata men autous blasphēmeitai kata de ymas doxazetai
mē gar tis ymōn paschetō ōs phoneus ē kleptēs ē kakopoios ē ōs allotrioepiskopos
ei de ōs christianos mē aischynesthō doxazetō de ton theon en tō merei toutō
oti o kairos tou arxasthai to krima apo tou oikou tou theou ei de prōton aph ēmōn ti to telos tōn apeithountōn tō tou theou euangeliō
kai ei o dikaios molis sōzetai o asebēs kai amartōlos pou phaneitai
ōste kai oi paschontes kata to thelēma tou theou ōs pistō ktistē paratithesthōsan tas psychas eautōn en agathopoiia
presbyterous tous en ymin parakalō o sympresbyteros kai martys tōn tou christou pathēmatōn o kai tēs mellousēs apokalyptesthai doxēs koinōnos
poimanate to en ymin poimnion tou theou episkopountes mē anankastōs all ekousiōs mēde aischrokerdōs alla prothymōs
mēd ōs katakyrieuontes tōn klērōn alla typoi ginomenoi tou poimniou
kai phanerōthentos tou archipoimenos komieisthe ton amarantinon tēs doxēs stephanon
omoiōs neōteroi ypotagēte presbyterois pantes de allēlois ypotassomenoi tēn tapeinophrosynēn enkombōsasthe oti o theos yperēphanois antitassetai tapeinois de didōsin charin
tapeinōthēte oun ypo tēn krataian cheira tou theou ina ymas ypsōsē en kairō
pasan tēn merimnan ymōn epirripsantes ep auton oti autō melei peri ymōn
nēpsate grēgorēsate oti o antidikos ymōn diabolos ōs leōn ōryomenos peripatei zētōn tina katapiē
ō antistēte stereoi tē pistei eidotes ta auta tōn pathēmatōn tē en kosmō ymōn adelphotēti epiteleisthai
o de theos pasēs charitos o kalesas ēmas eis tēn aiōnion autou doxan en christō iēsou oligon pathontas autos katartisai ymas stērixai sthenōsai themeliōsai
autō ē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
dia silouanou ymin tou pistou adelphou ōs logizomai di oligōn egrapsa parakalōn kai epimartyrōn tautēn einai alēthē charin tou theou eis ēn estēkate
aspazetai ymas ē en babylōni syneklektē kai markos o uios mou
aspasasthe allēlous en philēmati agapēs eirēnē ymin pasin tois en christō iēsou amēn
